name: CISCO SYSTEMS, INC.
summary: Cisco Systems, Inc. designs and sells networking and cybersecurity technology products and services. The company offers a broad portfolio including networking hardware, software, and services for enterprises, service providers, and governments. Cisco's solutions span switching, routing, wireless, security, collaboration, and observability, delivered through both hardware and increasingly software and subscription-based models.
